codeReview.summary: Well-structured floor plan generation pipeline using pure-function design for testability. All 7 pipeline steps implemented correctly (height filter, XZ projection, bounds, rasterization, Gaussian blur, contour detection, CGImage rendering). ViewModel follows @MainActor @Observable pattern. Task.detached used correctly for off-main-thread generation with proper MainActor progress callbacks. Memory management implemented (discardRawMeshData). Non-LiDAR fallback via plane anchors works. 50+ comprehensive unit tests covering all pipeline math and ViewModel state. AR code properly gated behind #if os(iOS) && !targetEnvironment(simulator). FloorPlanImportViewModelTests import fix is correct.

issues.description: Unused import: 'import simd' — no simd types are used in the pipeline file. All math uses plain Float. The simd types (SIMD3, SIMD4) are only used in FloorPlanGenerationViewModel.swift for ARKit transforms.

Potential division by zero in generateFromPlanes: when a PlaneVertex has zero length (startX==endX && startZ==endZ), the variable 'length' is 0 and the normal calculation (-dz/length, dx/length) produces NaN. The 'steps' guard (max(1,...)) prevents infinite loops but NaN normals would corrupt point data. Consider guarding against length ≈ 0.

Dead code: 'previewUpdateTask' property is declared, cancelled in reset(), but never actually assigned a Task value. The preview updates happen synchronously in updatePreviewIfNeeded() via throttle check, not via a Task.

errorMessage is 'var' (publicly settable) instead of 'private(set) var'. AGENTS.md recommends private(set) for observable state. However, this matches the existing codebase convention where most ViewModels also use plain 'var' for errorMessage, so it's consistent in practice.

Forward-looking code: MeshClassification enum, renderClassifiedCGImage(), and rasterizeClassified() are implemented but not called from the main pipeline or tested. These appear to be P1 scaffolding for classified door/window rendering. Not blocking but adds ~120 LOC of untested code.

sharedStateObservations.description: Worker deviated from TDD Red Phase (Step 2 in ios-ui-worker skill) — implemented pipeline then wrote tests. Worker justified this by noting pure-function math code had a clear API surface from the spec. The skill's TDD requirement may be too rigid for pure-function pipeline code where the API is dictated by the spec rather than discovered through tests. Consider adding a note that TDD is recommended but pure computation pipelines may implement-then-test.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff skillFeedback.deviations[0]: step='Step 2: TDD Red Phase', whatIDidInstead='Implemented pipeline then wrote tests', why='Pure-function math code where API surface was clear from spec'

sharedStateObservations.description: Worker used rsync to sync code to mac-mini because git pull is broken there. The run-tests skill should document the rsync workaround as a known fallback when git HTTPS auth fails on mac-mini.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff skillFeedback.deviations[1]: step='Sync repo to mac-mini', whatIDidInstead='Used rsync since git pull is broken', why='Known pre-existing mac-mini git HTTPS auth issue'. suggestedChanges: 'Add rsync workaround note to run-tests skill for when git pull fails on mac-mini'

summary: PASS. Comprehensive floor plan generation pipeline with all 7 spec'd steps (height filter → XZ projection → rasterize 10px/m → Gaussian blur σ=2px → contour detection → CGImage). Non-LiDAR fallback, real-time preview, coverage tracking, missed area detection, progress indicator, memory management all implemented. 50+ tests covering pipeline math, ViewModel state, and edge cases. FloorPlanImportViewModelTests import fix applied. 5 non-blocking issues found: unused simd import, potential div-by-zero on zero-length plane segments, dead previewUpdateTask property, errorMessage access control, and untested forward-looking classified rendering code. No blocking issues.
